focus: SwiftUI-driven mobile products with product-level attention to detail

about: I am a Computer Science student at UNISINOS and an Apple Developer Academy Fellow focused on building polished, useful digital products.
My main interests are iOS development with SwiftUI, product thinking, interface design and academic or technical projects that create real learning value.
I care about product clarity, good interaction decisions and implementation quality, whether the work is a mobile app, a system concept or a technical experiment.
